steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The sentence contains a relative clause with two verbs joined by and: "which typically are woven from sumac… and ______ bold colors." Both verbs share the same plural subject which (referring to baskets). The blank must be parallel to "are woven" and agree with a plural subject.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — feature: present tense, plural — parallel to "are woven" and agrees with the plural subject. ✓
  • Choice B — had featured: past perfect — shifts the tense away from the present-tense context. ✗
  • Choice C — were featuring: past progressive — wrong tense entirely. ✗
  • Choice D — featured: simple past — breaks the present-tense parallel. ✗
That matches Choice A — feature.
